body_txt: An Elemental Shapeshifter is a Shapeshifting character who can turn into one of the Natural Elements (typically air, earth, water, and fire, though this might vary according to the work). Depending on the story or situation, the character might be able to only partially change part of himself into the element involved, and may or may not retain his original shape after the change. The character's powers in their alternate form will depend on the element, but generally speaking, characters that turn into solid elements (like earth or metal ) will gain lumbering Super-Strength and armored Super-Toughness out of the deal, while characters that turn into fluid, particulate, gaseous, or energy-based elements (like fire , water , air , or lightning ) will usually be able to morph their limbs into Shapeshifter Weapons , shoot projectile blasts, and/or use a sort of selective Intangibility that allows incoming attacks to pass through their body harmlessly. Often invokes Elemental Baggage . A subtrope of Elemental Powers and Shapeshifting . Super Smoke (the ability to turn into air/smoke), Ride the Lightning and Ball of Light Transformation are subtropes of this. May overlap with Blob Monster , Chrome Champion , Taken for Granite , Wreathed in Flames , Harmless Liquefaction and the various forms of Elemental Powers . Also see Elemental Embodiment , Animate Inanimate Matter , and Material Mimicry .
